enrichment.summary: Kyle records a brief vlog while feeling ill, recounting his day of working late and purchasing additional lights to set up a green screen for future videos. He explains his lighting plan for both the bathroom and green screen setup, noting this will be his last video without the green screen.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited to start using it for a more professional look
wants videos to look good and professional regardless of how he feels physically
